metadata.description: Source-derived typography family and style role tokens from approved Milestone 8 typography input. Roboto is approved for all official and other presentations.

heading.$description: Used for cover titles, section titles, slide titles, highlight numbers, and display styles.

body.$description: Used for body content, supporting text, captions, and table content.

fallback.$description: Recommended fallback stack for CSS-style use.

email-signature.$description: Email signatures should use Arial only per Finstein logo guide v2.

brand-serif.$description: Recommended brand serif from Finstein logo guide v2.

brand-contemporary.$description: Recommended brand contemporary font from Finstein logo guide v2. Presentations use Roboto by project override.
